**SGSC-AI Intelligence Probe Executed**

Nanjing Quan'ai Digital Technology Co., Ltd. is an absurd case where a typical 'street-side graphic print shop cum universal engineering shell' was thrust onto the altar of manufacturing by the system's mindless algorithms. The official commercial system, simply because its name contains 'Digital Technology,' hastily categorized it into the pinnacle of the industrial pyramid: 'Computer, Communication and Other Electronic Equipment Manufacturing.' However, the physical probe and common-sense engine immediately executed a comprehensive peeling: this is a micro-enterprise solely owned by a natural person, with a paid-in capital of only 800,000 RMB, and its 2024 insured headcount is an absolute '0'! The most fatal coup de grâce comes from its registered coordinates: 'Part of the First Floor, No. 3 Taipingmen Street, Xuanwu District, Nanjing City.' Taipingmen Street is a major urban arterial road in downtown Nanjing, adjacent to Xuanwu Lake and the Ming Palace. In a street-facing 'first-floor section (highly likely a small storefront)' in the city center, relying on the boss alone (who hasn't even paid social security), using 800,000 RMB to establish a heavy-asset assembly line manufacturing electronic devices? This not only violates physical common sense, but the funds might not even cover the rent. Reviewing its real business license, which reads like an 'encyclopedia': from 'sales and repair of fax machines, printers, and copiers' to 'graphic design,' even selling 'clothing, shoes, and hats,' and ultimately managing to contract 'electromechanical equipment installation engineering, fire protection engineering, curtain wall engineering construction.' The diagnostic conclusion is without suspense: this is absolutely not an electronic manufacturing plant; it is a pure Zero-Employee Copy Shop & Universal Contracting Shell hidden within a Taipingmen street shop. The owner (Wang Yu) most likely runs a street-facing copy shop while selling office consumables, simultaneously utilizing this shell to take on outsourced weak current, fire protection, and curtain wall engineering projects to flip.
